description_long: This is a robust wristwatch with a black strap and a large, round case. The dial features a deep blue background with luminous Roman numerals and indices, as well as three prominent subdials, suggesting a chronograph function. The bezel is dark and slightly raised, with metallic accents that add a modern, technical look. The strap appears to be made of textured leather or synthetic material, secured with a classic buckle. The watch has several side buttons and a crown, likely for adjusting time and chronograph functions. The overall design is sporty and bold, suitable for urban and active environments.
description: A bold, black wristwatch with a blue chronograph dial, luminous Roman numerals, and a textured strap with a buckle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue dial with Roman numerals, subdials, and metallic bezel details.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thickness of the case, side buttons, and the curvature of the strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the strap's texture and the metal buckle clasp.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the case depth and strap attachment.
attribute_brand_logo: Circular emblem on the upper strap, gold in color, possibly a stylized letter or symbol; no visible text on the dial.
attribute_dial_design: Blue dial with luminous Roman numerals and indices, three subdials for chronograph functions, metallic hands, and a textured background. The style is sporty chronograph with technical detailing.
attribute_strap_type: Textured synthetic leather or leather strap with visible stitching and a classic buckle.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three hands (hour, minute, second) and three subdials for chronograph functions; luminous elements on numerals and hands.
